title: Mencari Senyum di Sudut Pasar Lama
theme: Menggali keindahan tersembunyi dan cerita-cerita kecil dalam rutinitas kota, menemukan inspirasi baru dari interaksi tak terduga.

cover.prompt: An interior shot of a minimalist home workspace in Jakarta. Through a large window, a muted, slightly hazy daytime cityscape of Jakarta extends. On a simple, uncluttered desk, a laptop screen displays abstract digital patterns and non-specific text, next to a steaming cup of instant coffee. In the foreground, a single, vibrantly colored potted plant with open blossoms provides a striking contrast to the otherwise calm and neutral tones of the room and city beyond. The overall mood is quiet contemplation with a subtle yearning for sensory richness.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading, rule of thirds composition, soft natural lighting

meta.plan_summary: A young freelancer, Maya, breaks free from her monotonous routine to explore an unfamiliar traditional market, getting lost but finding unexpected warmth, forgotten culinary delights, and artistic inspiration through heartwarming encounters, particularly with an elderly vendor.
meta.target_emotion: Warmth, optimism, curiosity, inspiration, joy of discovery.
